narrative:
Clark Twp township has 1,792 registered voters, with 59.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.1 percentage points.
